commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof, is far behind the current Google Chat plugin architecture, changes security-sensitive auth/access paths, and includes a reply-default product dec...; Needs attention: The diff introduces concrete Google Chat auth, access-control, JWT-verification, and sensitive logging regressions.; Review finding: [P1] Keep add-on tokens bound to appPrincipal... (sha=7762373cb9c55aa9bb90e3fe8e827a6bf5bf1b92)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Google Chat Space/thread handling, webhook parsing, auth/token handling, inbound access policy, outbound media delivery, webhook deduplication, and the Google Chat reply-to default.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review blockers: PR-head and current-main source comparison shows the auth binding removal, sender-policy downgrade, broad BOT mention match, raw logging, unsafe dedupe, and lifecycle defects. I did not run live Google Chat traffic in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof, is far behind the current Google Chat plugin architecture, changes security-sensitive auth/access paths, and includes a reply-default product decision.

target.title: (googlechat) fix: space messaging, introduce deduplication, and update reply-to defaults
target.author: lamdt1

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
